summary: Tested all 4 bug fixes for NEHER electrophysiology analysis app. All fixes verified working: (1) decimal minute HRV lookup uses int() conversion in analysis.py, (2) comparison metadata shows per-drug Perf. Time, (3) 'Readout Time Range:' label replaced old format, (4) input width increased to w-16.
critical_code_review_comments: analysis.py line 1061: hrv_minute_lookup = int(hrv_minute) - correctly handles decimal inputs like 0.5 by converting to int for window lookup
server.py line 1480: per_drug_metrics includes 'perf_time' field for each drug
FolderComparison.js lines 818-835: metadata display correctly fetches perf_time from per_drug_metrics for each drug
AnalysisPanel.js lines 796,811,923,941: w-16 class on readout inputs (increased from w-14) for decimal number display
AnalysisPanel.js lines 801,816,929,947: 'Readout Time Range:' label with Math.floor() to avoid leading zeros
seed_data_creation: Used existing test folder: 69a77b6d5549a8d937e5adf4 (H9 NeuCarS + Light Stimulus under Propranolol)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixes tested: (1) analysis.py int(hrv_minute) conversion at line 1061, (2) server.py per_drug_metrics includes perf_time at line 1480, (3) FolderComparison.js displays per-drug perf_time, (4) AnalysisPanel.js uses w-16 input width and 'Readout Time Range:' label without leading zeros

features_verified.decimal_minute_hrv_lookup: PASS - analysis.py uses int(hrv_minute) for window lookup, allowing decimal inputs like 0.5
features_verified.per_drug_perf_time_in_comparison: PASS - comparison API returns perf_time in per_drug_metrics for each drug
features_verified.readout_time_range_label: PASS - 'Readout Time Range:' label shown in UI (replaced old 'Readout:' format)
features_verified.no_leading_zeros_in_time_range: PASS - Time ranges show '1-2min', '0-3min' without leading zeros
features_verified.input_width_for_decimals: PASS - w-16 class on readout inputs provides adequate width for decimal values
features_verified.step_attribute_for_decimals: PASS - step='0.5' attribute allows decimal input

playwright_tests.metadata_perf_time_display: PASS - 'Perf. Time: 1min' visible in comparison metadata
playwright_tests.readout_time_range_label: PASS - 'Readout Time Range: 1-2min' and 'Readout Time Range: 0-3min' visible
playwright_tests.no_leading_zeros: PASS - Time ranges properly formatted without leading zeros
playwright_tests.input_field_widths: PASS - w-16 class found on readout inputs
